name: Effect of Nonmyeloablative Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplantation vs Continued Disease-Modifying Therapy on Disease Progression in Patients With Relapsing-Remitting Multiple Sclerosis: A Randomized Clinical Trial
summary: A randomized clinical trial comparing nonmyeloablative hematopoietic stem cell transplantation with continued disease-modifying therapy in relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis.
